title: Maggie Wagner, Attorney - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## Maggie Wagner, Attorney
Maggie works on nonimmigrant petitions and writes articles for the MurthyBulletin and MurthyDotCom.
Before joining the Murthy Law Firm, Maggie worked in business immigration as a paralegal for two years. During law school, she worked as a law clerk in business immigration for two years. She also worked with community organizations in Arizona on asylum and cancellation of removal cases.

## Education & Admissions
- Bachelor of Arts (magna cum laude), Economics, St. Mary’s College of Maryland, 2016
- Bachelor of Arts (magna cum laude), International Public Policy, St. Mary’s College of Maryland, 2016
- Juris Doctorate (cum laude), University of Arizona, James E. Rogers College of Law
- Admitted to the State Bar of Maryland

## Memberships & Professional Accomplishments
- Maryland State Bar Association
